typography.instructions: Use 'Manrope' for all headings to give a modern, geometric feel. Use 'Inter' for body text for maximum readability. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for anything related to keywords, code, or prompts.

kinetic.description: Use ONLY for the 'Generate' or 'Publish' primary actions

rules: No gradients for backgrounds unless it is a subtle surface distinction.
Text contrast must be WCAG AA compliant.
Use 'Kinetic Orange' (#F97316) sparingly - only for the main conversion action.

containers.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-slate-800 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium transition-all shadow-sm active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium transition-all shadow-sm
buttons.kinetic: bg-orange-500 text-white hover:bg-orange-600 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-bold shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all active:scale-95

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-blue-200 transition-all cursor-pointer group

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.success: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-950 focus:ring-offset-2 text-emerald-700
badges.warning: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-950 focus:ring-offset-2 text-amber-700
badges.neutral: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:ring-offset-2 text-slate-600

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: relative after:absolute after:inset-0 after:rounded-xl after:border-2 after:border-blue-500/0 hover:after:border-blue-500/50 after:transition-colors after:pointer-events-none

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on colored backgrounds meets WCAG AA 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (focus-visible:ring-2).
accessibility.labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

instructions_to_main_agent: Sidebar should be fixed on the left (w-64) in dark mode (#0F172A), main content on the right in light mode (#F8FAFC).
Use the Bento Grid layout for the Dashboard Overview.
For the Article Generator, use a split-view layout (Inputs on Left, Preview on Right).
ALL interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds, only for subtle highlights.
Use 2-3x more spacing than default for a premium feel (e.g., p-8 instead of p-4).
Add micro-interactions to every button and card (hover lift, border color change).
Never center text in the main app container.
